final:
module sync_up_counter_32bit (
    input clk_inv,
    input rst,
    input en,
    input load,
    input [31:0] load_value,
    output reg [31:0] count
);

always @(posedge clk_inv or posedge rst) begin
    if (rst) begin
        count <= 32'b0;
    end else if (load) begin
        count <= load_value;
    end else if (en) begin
        count <= count + 1;
    end
end

endmodule
